_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of network security implementations (e.g., host-based IDS, IPS, access control lists), including their function and placement in a network.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encryption at rest and in transit, identity and access management, and audit logging.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-013 (TF, cosine: 0.640), SP-S-008 (SP, cosine: 0.505).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.547). Shared vocabulary: [access, knowledge, network, security]. DCWF-only terms [based, control, function, host, ids, implementations] vs WIDAI-only terms [audit, controls, data, encryption, identity, isolation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.890 (P=0.885, R=0.894). Balanced P/R — the 20-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Knowledge of network security implementations (e.g., host-based IDS, IPS, access" and "Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encry" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.649 > STS 0.547 (gap +0.101). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [access, knowledge, network, security] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 24.2%. Shared tokens: [access, knowledge, network, security]. DCWF-only: [based, control, function, host, ids, implementations]. WIDAI-only: [audit, controls, data, encryption, identity, isolation].

signals.detail: STS 0.547 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
